compiled_state.title: Delete test-locked orphan: ticket-update-rav.sh (dso read-after-write-verification wrapper)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
RAV wrapper around the ticket CLI for dso agents; zero non-test references (git grep -il rav -> only the script + its test); its mock env REBAR_TICKET_RAV_TEST is set by nothing else. Distinct from the verdict-hash close gate, which is LIVE — do not touch compute-verdict-hash.sh.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket-update-rav.sh + tests/scripts/test-ticket-update-rav.sh deleted
- [ ] compute-verdict-hash.sh untouched; full suite green
